data.name: Hot Vacation
data.detailed_description:
GAMEPLAY



This is a relaxing match-3 game with simple and intuitive click-based gameplay. Instead of swapping tiles, you just click on groups of three or more identical elements to remove them instantly, making the experience smooth and stress-free.

Set in a hot vacation atmosphere , the game blends casual match-3 mechanics with NSFW-themed visuals and seductive artwork. Beautiful girls, sun-soaked vibes, and playful fanservice create a spicy yet relaxing experience. Combined with calm music and easy levels, the game is perfect for unwinding, enjoying the view , and escaping into a warm, carefree holiday mood.

GAME FEATURES


  • Pleasant music
  • Beautiful girls
  • Simple levels
  • Enjoyable pastime
  • Steam Achievments

data.short_description: A relaxing match-3 game where you simply click on groups of three or more identical tiles to clear them instantly. Enjoy calm music, smooth gameplay, and beautiful artwork featuring attractive girls, all wrapped in a hot vacation vibe
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer, 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-6100 / AMD FX-8350
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 580 / AMD HD 7870
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer, 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4670K / AMD Ryzen 5 1500X
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050 / AMD HD 7970
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
